author: Deva Singh
title: Jiwan Sudhar
gloss: A collection of religious precepts for the Sikhs.

title: Gutka Gur Updesh Wadda
gloss: Selected verses from the Sikh Granth.
publisher: Bhai Jot Singh Sant Singh, Book-sellers
notes: A gutka (breviary) of Granth selections, 3,000 copies; composite pagination.

title: Jagti Jot
gloss: A brief account of the life and work of Guru Gobind Singh, the 10th Sikh Guru.
publisher: Bhai Kishan Singh and Hardit Singh
notes: Issued in commemoration of Guru Gobind Singh's birthday.

title: Kharra Khalsa Dharam Shastr arthat Sikhan de dharam panth di biwastha
gloss: A compendium of the religious ceremonies of the Sikhs.
notes: A draft Sikh code of religious ceremonies from the Khalsa Dharam Shastr Committee, Anandpur — part of the standardization effort that culminated in the later Sikh Rahit Maryada; core homogenization/codification document. pencil 'not available' left margin (a prior-hand availability note).

author: Sawan Singh, Bhai
title: Shabad di Mehma de Shabad Mehman de shabad
gloss: Select verses from the Sikh Granth.
copyright: Bhai Sawan Singh, Abbottabad; No. 27, dated the 14th January, 1910.

author: Abdul Hayi
title: Imdad-i-Rahmani fi Kashf-i-Aqida-i-Qadiyani
gloss: A controversial booklet directed against Mirza Ghulam Ahmad of Kadian, in which the writer tries to show that the teachings of the Mirza are against the spirit of the Quran and the traditions.
notes: Anti-Ahmadiyya polemic in Punjabi (Persian script) — the Qadiani controversy already prominent in Q1 (cf. p29-31 of Q4). Serial 6 continues Punjabi—Religion across the script subsection.

author: Balak Ram, Lala
title: Pahare samet Gur
gloss: Arithmetical tables and formulæ for calculations.
